---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

labels: epic

---

**Feature Description**
A clear and concise description of the feature you want to add.

**Use Case**
Explain why this feature is needed and how it will benefit users.

**Proposed Solution**
A brief description of how you think this feature could be implemented (optional).

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
